description: kv_set stores a value; kv_get retrieves it; kv_delete removes it; kv_exists checks.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.kv_set('name', 'Alice'))
print(s.kv_get('name'))
print(s.kv_exists('name'))
print(s.kv_delete('name'))
print(s.kv_exists('name'))
print(s.kv_get('missing'))

description: kv_incr auto-creates at 0 and increments; repeated calls accumulate.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.kv_incr('c'))
print(s.kv_incr('c'))
print(s.kv_incr('c'))
print(s.kv_get('c'))

description: kv_decr auto-creates at 0 and decrements.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.kv_decr('score'))
print(s.kv_decr('score'))
print(s.kv_get('score'))

description: kv_mset sets multiple keys; kv_mget returns list with None for missing.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.kv_mset({'x':'10','y':'hello'}))
print(s.kv_mget('x','missing','y'))

description: lpush prepends; lrange shows correct order.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.lpush('items','c','b','a'))
print(s.lrange('items',0,None))

description: rpush appends preserving order.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.rpush('q','a','b','c'))
print(s.lrange('q',0,None))

description: lpop removes and returns first; rpop removes and returns last.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.rpush('q','one','two','three')
print(s.lpop('q'))
print(s.rpop('q'))
print(s.lrange('q',0,None))
print(s.lpop('empty'))

description: sadd adds members; smembers returns the set; scard returns cardinality.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.sadd('colors','red','green','blue'))
print(sorted(s.smembers('colors')))
print(s.scard('colors'))
print(s.sadd('colors','red','yellow'))
print(s.scard('colors'))

description: srem removes members and returns count removed.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.sadd('tags','a','b','c')
print(s.srem('tags','a','x','c'))
print(sorted(s.smembers('tags')))
print(s.scard('tags'))

description: hset sets a field; hget retrieves; missing returns None.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s.hset('user:1','name','Alice'))
print(s.hget('user:1','name'))
print(s.hget('user:1','email'))

description: hdel removes a field; hgetall returns all field-value pairs.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.hset('user:1','name','Alice')
s.hset('user:1','age','30')
print(s.hgetall('user:1'))
print(s.hdel('user:1','age'))
print(s.hgetall('user:1'))

description: kv_flush removes all keys and returns count.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('a','1')
s.lpush('b','x')
s.sadd('c','y')
print(s.kv_flush())
print(s.kv_get('a'))
print(s.lrange('b',0,None))

description: expire sets timeout (returns None).
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('k','v')
print(s.expire('k',300))

description: save_to_disk persists state; restore_from_disk restores it.
test_code:
import os, tempfile
from minikv import QueueServer
f = os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), 'test_mkv.db')
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('name','Alice')
s.kv_incr('c')
print(s.save_to_disk(f))
s2 = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
print(s2.restore_from_disk(f))
print(s2.kv_get('name'))
print(s2.kv_get('c'))
os.remove(f)

description: kv_set overwrites previous value and type.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('k','first')
s.kv_set('k','second')
print(s.kv_get('k'))

description: kv_set auto-detects dict as HASH and list as QUEUE.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('h',{'a':'1'})
print(s.hget('h','a'))
s.kv_set('lst',['x','y'])
print(s.lrange('lst',0,None))

description: lpush on a string key raises CommandError.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer, CommandError
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('name','Alice')
try:
    s.lpush('name','x')
    print('no-error')
except CommandError:
    print('type-error')

description: kv_incr on a non-integer string value raises CommandError.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer, CommandError
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('name','Alice')
try:
    s.kv_incr('name')
    print('no-error')
except CommandError:
    print('value-error')

description: Values created by kv_set/lpush/sadd/hset flow correctly through kv_get/lrange/smembers/hget.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('str','hello')
s.lpush('lst','world')
s.sadd('st','python')
s.hset('hash','k','val')
print(s.kv_get('str'))
print(s.lrange('lst',0,None))
print(sorted(s.smembers('st')))
print(s.hget('hash','k'))

description: kv_incr values flow correctly into hset; both kv_get and hgetall agree.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_incr('a')
s.kv_incr('a')
s.kv_incr('b')
s.hset('counters','a',str(s.kv_get('a')))
s.hset('counters','b',str(s.kv_get('b')))
print(s.kv_get('a'))
print(s.kv_get('b'))
print(s.hgetall('counters'))

description: lpush and sadd accumulate independently; lrange and smembers each reflect their own state.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.lpush('names','alice','bob')
s.lpush('names','carol')
s.sadd('tags','python','rust')
s.sadd('tags','python','go')
print(s.lrange('names',0,None))
print(sorted(s.smembers('tags')))
print(s.scard('tags'))

description: sadd+srem on set and hset overwrites on hash accumulate independently.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.sadd('team','alice','bob','carol')
s.srem('team','carol')
s.hset('scores','alice','10')
s.hset('scores','bob','20')
s.hset('scores','alice','15')
print(sorted(s.smembers('team')))
print(s.scard('team'))
print(s.hgetall('scores'))

description: kv_flush clears all types; all accessors return empty/nil after.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('a','1')
s.lpush('b','x')
s.sadd('c','y')
s.hset('d','f','z')
print(s.kv_flush())
print(s.kv_get('a'))
print(s.lrange('b',0,None))
print(s.smembers('c'))
print(s.hgetall('d'))

description: kv_delete allows same key name to be reused with different type.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.lpush('x','a','b')
print(s.lrange('x',0,None))
s.kv_delete('x')
s.kv_set('x','now-string')
print(s.kv_get('x'))

description: Failed lpush on string key preserves original value.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer, CommandError
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('data','important')
try:
    s.lpush('data','x')
except CommandError:
    pass
print(s.kv_get('data'))

description: Failed hset on a set key preserves set contents.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer, CommandError
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.sadd('config','debug','verbose')
print(s.scard('config'))
try:
    s.hset('config','theme','dark')
except CommandError:
    pass
print(s.scard('config'))
print(sorted(s.smembers('config')))

description: Same elements in a list preserve LIFO order; in a set they deduplicate.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.lpush('seq','1','2','3')
print(s.lpop('seq'))
print(s.lpop('seq'))
s.sadd('uniq','1','2','3')
s.sadd('uniq','1')
print(s.scard('uniq'))

description: kv_set after lpush overwrites and resets type; list ops on overwritten key raise CommandError.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer, CommandError
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.lpush('k','a','b')
print(s.lrange('k',0,None))
s.kv_set('k','replaced')
print(s.kv_get('k'))
try:
    s.lrange('k',0,None)
except CommandError:
    print('type-error')

description: save_to_disk→kv_flush→restore_from_disk fully restores all types.
test_code:
import os, tempfile
from minikv import QueueServer
f = os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), 'test_full.db')
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('str','hello')
s.lpush('lst','x')
s.sadd('st','y')
s.hset('h','f','z')
s.save_to_disk(f)
s.kv_flush()
s.restore_from_disk(f)
print(s.kv_get('str'))
print(s.lrange('lst',0,None))
print(sorted(s.smembers('st')))
print(s.hgetall('h'))
os.remove(f)

description: Expired key returns None/0 on access; unexpired keys remain; kv_flush clears all.
test_code:
from minikv import QueueServer
s = QueueServer(use_gevent=False)
s.kv_set('a','1')
s.lpush('b','x')
s.sadd('c','y')
s.hset('d','f','z')
s.expire('a',1)
import time; time.sleep(1.5)
print(s.kv_get('a'))
print(s.kv_exists('a'))
print(s.lrange('b',0,None))
print(s.smembers('c'))
print(s.kv_flush())
